Package kafe

Class BaseSetup<I,S,R>

java.lang.Object
kafe.BaseSetup<I,S,R>
Direct Known Subclasses:
BaseConfirm, BaseDescribe, BaseGiven, BaseValue
public abstract class BaseSetup<I,S,R> extends Object
BaseSetup is the unified base class for all setup phases. It covers BDD's Given, AAA's Arrange, and TDT's Map.
